reported_entities.name: Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. (中華電信)
reported_entities.claim: Primary corporate site; largest integrated telecom operator in Taiwan (NYSE: CHT, TWSE: 2412), offering 5G mobile, HiNet fiber broadband, MOD IPTV. Confirmed as the entity behind the query term via Salva discovery (qualified_count=7, retrieval_health=ok, confidence 0.40-0.45) and cross-checked via Wikipedia/Wikidata.

reported_entities.name: Chunghwa Telecom - 123 我的服務中心 (customer portal)
reported_entities.claim: Chunghwa Telecom's official customer self-service portal subdomain.

reported_entities.name: HiNet (Chunghwa Telecom's ISP brand)
reported_entities.claim: HiNet is Chunghwa Telecom's broadband/webmail brand, returned as a related property.

reported_entities.name: Chunghwa Telecom Laboratories
reported_entities.claim: Chunghwa Telecom's R&D subsidiary (CHTTL), found via WebSearch, confirming corporate group structure.

notes: Salva discovery (market=Taiwan, industry=telecommunications, extra_keywords=['中華電信']) returned 7 qualified entities, all genuinely Chunghwa Telecom properties (cht.com.tw, hinet.net domains) plus a couple of low-relevance third-party review/job-posting pages -- no contamination from unrelated companies. WebSearch (1 query) confirmed official English name 'Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd.' and explicitly distinguished it from mainland China's China Telecom Corporation Limited (中国电信, chinatelecom.com.cn), a separate PRC state-owned carrier with a similar-sounding but different Chinese name. No cross-language confusion occurred in Salva's results themselves; disambiguation was done via prior knowledge + WebSearch verification since Salva does not natively flag the mainland namesake risk.
